verdict: DOCKED

# Documentation Docking - issue-582

Docked surfaces:

- `commands/kaola-workflow-plan-run.md` and the GitLab/Gitea command mirrors
  require a fresh child-session effort proof before tiered Codex dispatch.
- `plugins/kaola-workflow/skills/kaola-workflow-plan-run/SKILL.md` and the
  GitLab/Gitea skill mirrors carry the same proof rule.
- `docs/api.md` records the public adaptive model-tier contract.
- `docs/decisions/D-582-02.md` records the local runtime evidence and decision.
- `CHANGELOG.md` records the corrected user-visible behavior.

Not applicable:

- `.env.example`: no environment variable changed.
- Architecture docs: no component or data-flow diagram changed.
- Roadmap: finalization owns the issue source removal and generated roadmap
  refresh during archive/sink.
